title: meliosma pumila
intro: Meliosma pumila, also known as the Dwarf Meliosma, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Meliosma pumila include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
